options.name: -r
options.description: Includes the current directory and all its subdirectories in a search operation.

options.name: -md5
options.description: Compute the file using the MD5 hash algorithm.

options.name: -sha1
options.description: Compute the file using the SHA1 hash algorithm.

options.name: -sha256
options.description: Compute the file using the SHA256 hash algorithm.

options.name: -sha384
options.description: Compute the file using the SHA384 hash algorithm.

options.name: -sha512
options.description: Compute the file using the SHA512 hash algorithm.
